name: Blink Charging Co.
summary: Blink Charging Co. (BLNK) owns, operates, and provides electric vehicle (EV) charging equipment and services. The company sells and deploys EV charging stations, offers various business models to Property Partners, and generates revenue through charging fees, hardware sales, occupancy fees, subscription plans, advertising fees, and long-term contracts with special purpose vehicles (SPVs). Blink also develops next-generation EV charging equipment and leverages proprietary technology to serve both property owners and EV drivers.
